mapper.select:
SELECT board_idx, comment_idx, group_comment_idx, parent_comment_idx, group_comment_depth, comment_content, user_id, user_name, user_ip, add_date, ilus_user_id, ilus_user_seq FROM CMS_BOARD_COMMENT WHERE board_idx = #{board_idx} AND delete_yn = 'N'
ORDER BY group_comment_idx , comment_idx
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_BOARD_COMMENT WHERE board_idx = #{board_idx} AND delete_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CMS_BOARD_COMMENT ( board_idx, comment_idx, group_comment_idx, parent_comment_idx, group_comment_depth, comment_content, user_id, user_name, user_ip, delete_yn, add_date, modify_date, ilus_user_id, ilus_user_seq ) VALUES ( #{board_idx}, #{comment_idx}, #{comment_idx}, #{parent_comment_idx}, #{group_comment_depth}, #{comment_content}, #{user_id}, #{user_name}, #{user_ip}, 'N', SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{ilus_user_id}, #{ilus_user_seq} )
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_BOARD_COMMENT SET comment_content = #{comment_content}, modify_date = SYSDATE WHERE board_idx = #{board_idx} AND comment_idx = #{comment_idx} AND user_id = #{user_id}
mapper.insert:
SELECT CMS_BOARD_COMMENT_IDX_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CMS_BOARD_COMMENT ( board_idx, comment_idx, group_comment_idx, parent_comment_idx, group_comment_depth, comment_content, user_id, user_name, user_ip, delete_yn, add_date, modify_date, ilus_user_id, ilus_user_seq ) VALUES ( #{board_idx}, #{comment_idx}, #{group_comment_idx}, #{parent_comment_idx}, #{group_comment_depth} + 1, #{comment_content}, #{user_id}, #{user_name}, #{user_ip}, 'N', SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{ilus_user_id}, #{ilus_user_seq} )
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_BOARD_COMMENT SET delete_yn = 'Y' WHERE board_idx = #{board_idx} AND comment_idx = #{comment_idx}
